registration.name: Vehicle Registration
registration.blurb: Register a new, imported, or used vehicle at Kreis Steinfurt. We prepare the paperwork and handle the counter.

re-registration.name: Re-registration
re-registration.blurb: Transfer ownership, update address, or change plates. We handle the full re-registration flow.

deregistration.name: Deregistration
deregistration.blurb: Take a vehicle out of circulation — sale, scrap, or export. We deregister it cleanly with the Zulassungsstelle.

license-plate.name: License Plates
license-plate.blurb: Custom plates (Wunschkennzeichen), replacement plates, season plates — ordered, stamped, delivered.

express.name: Express Service
express.blurb: Same-day handling for time-critical cases. Priority queue at the Zulassungsstelle.

serviceDetail.readySub: Tell us about your vehicle on WhatsApp — we'll review everything in minutes.

howItWorks.heading: How it works
howItWorks.title: Three steps. That's it.
howItWorks.subtitle: A transparent, managed timeline. We handle the friction; you receive the results.

step1.title: Submit request via WhatsApp
step1.desc: Message us. We immediately outline the specific documents for your exact vehicle type and situation.

step2.title: Digital document verification
step2.desc: Send photos of your documents. We audit them for completeness to guarantee success at the authority.

step3.title: Registration & delivery
step3.desc: We process your application in Rheine. Stamped documents and new plates ready within 48 hours — pickup or courier.

howItWorks.pageSubtitle: No queues, no confusion — a managed path from question to stamped documents.

step1.title: Message us
step1.desc: Open WhatsApp and tell us what you need. We reply within minutes during office hours.

step2.title: We pre-verify
step2.desc: Send photos of your documents. We check completeness so nothing bounces back at the counter.

step3.title: Hand over the paperwork
step3.desc: Drop by the office in Rheine or use the courier option. You keep your time; we walk into the authority.

step4.title: Plates in your hand
step4.desc: We return stamped documents and new plates within 48 hours — pickup, delivery, or direct to the repair shop.

secure.title: Secure handling
secure.desc: Your documents never leave our custody. We work with German data-protection standards by default.

express.title: Express option
express.desc: Time-critical? Add the Express extra — same-day handling where the authority permits it.

alwaysOn.title: Always-on updates
alwaysOn.desc: Every hand-off, every stamp — delivered as a short WhatsApp update. No surprises.

trust.title: Loved locally
trust.desc: Consistent 5-star feedback from drivers in Rheine & Kreis Steinfurt. Read their words below.

cta.title: Ready to skip the line?
cta.subtitle: Initiate your registration in under 60 seconds. Our concierge desk is standing by to review your documents.

faq.title: Quick answers
faq.subtitle: The five we hear most. The full list is on
faq.pageSubtitle: The questions we hear most — grouped, searchable, and answered in plain language.
faq.noResults: No matching questions. Try a different search.

cost.question: How much does the service cost?
cost.answer: Our service fee starts at €29 incl. VAT. Authority fees from Kreis Steinfurt come on top and depend on the exact service. See our pricing page for a clear breakdown.

duration.question: How long does a registration take?
duration.answer: Once we have all the original documents and they pass our digital pre-verification, the physical registration at the Rheine authority typically takes 24–48 hours. Same-day Express is available Mon–Fri.

documents_needed.question: Which documents do I need?
documents_needed.answer: It depends on the service. For a new registration: valid ID or passport, eVB insurance number, signed SEPA mandate, Zulassungsbescheinigung II, and the HU/AU report for used vehicles. See our documents page for the full list per service.

original_id.question: Do I need to hand over my original ID?
original_id.answer: Yes — the authority requires the original ID for final processing. We arrange a secure handover via courier or our in-office lockbox.

wunschkennzeichen.question: Can you handle custom plates (Wunschkennzeichen)?
wunschkennzeichen.answer: Yes. Reserve your combination online (free) and share the PIN with us, or let us reserve it for you. Kreis Steinfurt currently charges ~€10.20 for the combination.

keep_plates.question: Can I keep my existing plates when I re-register?
keep_plates.answer: In many cases yes — we'll confirm during our intake on WhatsApp. If the authority assigns new plates, we can stamp them on the spot.

same_day.question: Can I still come today?
same_day.answer: Check the hours on our contact page — the card shows whether we're open right now. Outside of opening hours, message us on WhatsApp and we'll arrange a slot.

payment.question: How do I pay?
payment.answer: You pay our service fee in cash or by card at pickup. Authority fees are typically settled via SEPA direct debit against your mandate.

hidden_fees.question: Are there any hidden fees?
hidden_fees.answer: No. Our service fee is fixed for the service you pick. Authority fees are set by Kreis Steinfurt and are always shown separately.

lost_document.question: What if I lost a document?
lost_document.answer: Tell us on WhatsApp — we know the fastest path for lost Zulassungsbescheinigungen, insurance letters, or SEPA mandates and can usually resolve it the same week.

deliver_plates.question: Can you deliver my new plates?
deliver_plates.answer: Yes — we offer courier delivery within Rheine from €25. For surrounding towns, we'll quote a flat rate on WhatsApp.

express_urgency.question: How urgent is Express?
express_urgency.answer: Express means we aim to have your vehicle registered the same day, subject to authority capacity. You'll get a confirmation on WhatsApp within 30 minutes.

documents.pageSubtitle: Every document we ask for, what it looks like, and why it matters. Filter by service to see only what applies to you.
documents.lostDocSub: Tell us what's missing — we'll tell you the fastest recovery path.

id_card.title: ID card or passport
id_card.description: A valid German Personalausweis, residence permit, or passport — we confirm identity at the authority.

evb.title: eVB Number
evb.description: Seven-character electronic insurance confirmation from your insurer. Required to register any vehicle on the road.

sepa.title: SEPA Mandate
sepa.description: Direct-debit mandate for the motor vehicle tax (Kfz-Steuer). We provide a fillable template.

zb1.title: Zulassungsbescheinigung I
zb1.description: Vehicle registration certificate that stays in the car — the "small" green document.

zb2.title: Zulassungsbescheinigung II
zb2.description: Vehicle title / certificate of ownership — kept safe at home, needed for ownership changes.

hu_report.title: HU / AU Report
hu_report.description: Valid main inspection (TÜV/Dekra) report. Must still be within its validity window at the time of registration.

power_of_attorney.title: Power of attorney
power_of_attorney.description: Signed authorisation that lets us act at the Zulassungsstelle on your behalf.

sales_contract.title: Sales contract
sales_contract.description: Signed purchase agreement (used car) with seller / buyer details and vehicle identifiers.

plates.title: Old plates
plates.description: For re-registration or deregistration — please bring the existing plates to the office.

wunschkennzeichen.name: Custom plates (Wunschkennzeichen)
wunschkennzeichen.description: Reserve and order your custom license-plate combination before we register the car.

plate_stamping.name: Plate stamping
plate_stamping.description: We pick up stamped, ready-to-mount license plates — no extra trip for you.

courier.name: Courier delivery
courier.description: Stamped documents and plates delivered to your home, office, or dealership.

express.name: Express handling
express.description: Same-day slot where the Zulassungsstelle allows it. Priority queue included.

power_of_attorney_prep.name: Power-of-attorney prep
power_of_attorney_prep.description: We prepare the signed authorisation for you — just sign and send back.

used_car_check.name: Used-car document check
used_car_check.description: Pre-purchase review of Zulassungsbescheinigung II, HU report, and VIN plausibility.

pricing.pageSubtitle: Our fee is what you pay us — authority fees (set by Kreis Steinfurt) are separate and always shown.
pricing.authorityDisclaimer: Authority fees are set by Kreis Steinfurt and may change without notice.

contact.pageTitle: Get in touch with the concierge

channels.whatsappDesc: Fastest channel — photos, forms, and status updates in one thread.
channels.phoneDesc: Prefer a short call? We answer Mon–Fri during office hours.
channels.emailDesc: Attach scans or use for anything formal. Reply usually within hours.

contact.officeText: 200 m from the Rheine registration office (Zulassungsstelle Kreis Steinfurt). Parking directly in front.

chatbot.title: Concierge Assistant
chatbot.pageSubtitle: Quick answers, or we'll prepare a WhatsApp request for you.
chatbot.greet: Hi! I'm the Civic Concierge assistant. What would you like to do today?
chatbot.askServiceSuffix: . Do you want our Express service (same-day if possible)?
chatbot.handoff: Thanks {name} — I've prepared a request. You can continue on WhatsApp and we'll take it from here.
chatbot.askPrice: Our service fee starts at €29 incl. VAT. Authority fees from Kreis Steinfurt come on top. Would you like a quote for a specific service?
chatbot.askDocuments: For most registrations you'll need: ID or passport, eVB insurance confirmation, SEPA mandate for motor tax, and the Zulassungsbescheinigung II (vehicle title). Shall I start a request?
chatbot.talkHuman: I can hand you to the team directly. You'll get a reply in WhatsApp within minutes during office hours.
chatbot.fallback: Sorry, I didn't catch that. Would you like to continue on WhatsApp?

aboutPage.title: Who we are
aboutPage.subtitle: Your trusted partner for vehicle registration in Rheine & Kreis Steinfurt.

intro.text: For over ten years, we have been firmly rooted in the local community – and for the past five years, we have also been actively involved in vehicle registration services and DEKRA-certified license plate embossing. What began as a passion for cars has evolved into a modern, reliable vehicle registration service with comprehensive support.

experience.title: Built on real experience
experience.text: Our experience is no accident: Through privately buying and selling around 80 vehicles, we have developed a deep understanding of all the processes, challenges, and details surrounding vehicles. We have incorporated this knowledge into our business – with the goal of making things as easy as possible for our customers.

services.title: What we offer
services.text: Today, we offer much more than just standard vehicle registration:

items.0: We handle all registration matters – from initial registration, deregistration, and re-registration to changes of ownership.
items.1: Whether it's a car, motorcycle, motorhome, or specialty vehicle – you're in the best hands with us.
items.2: Online deregistration is also a standard part of our service.
items.3: We take care of technical modifications and reliably accompany our customers to their vehicle inspection appointments.
items.4: We prepare everything in advance so you don't have to worry about a thing – quickly, easily, and professionally.

team.title: Our team
team.text: Our company is backed by three women from Rheine: dedicated, competent, and with a strong network and direct connections to the vehicle registration office. We know what matters – and we are passionately committed to your needs.

promise.title: Our promise
promise.text: Maximum service, minimal waiting time – and the peace of mind of not having to lift a finger.

footer.tagline: Fast, trustworthy vehicle registration in Rheine & Kreis Steinfurt. WhatsApp-first, calm, and handled.
footer.copyright: © {year} Civic Concierge · Rheine Vehicle Registration Services
